settings.custom_css: .vmt-card-template{font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;color:#111;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%,#fff 0%,#fbfaf7 46%,#f7f6f2 100%)}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-title .elementor-heading-title{font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif!important;font-size:70px!important;line-height:1!important;font-weight:800!important;color:#071452!important;letter-spacing:-1px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor{width:420px;max-width:80%;height:20px;position:relative}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor:before,.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor:after{content:"";position:absolute;top:9px;width:180px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#D4A017,#D4A017,transparent)}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor:before{left:0}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor:after{right:0}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor span{position:absolute;left:50%;top:-2px;transform:translateX(-50%);width:72px;height:24px}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor span:before{content:"✦  ❀  ✦";display:block;text-align:center;color:#D4A017;font-size:24px;line-height:22px}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-grid{display:flex!important;flex-direction:row!important;flex-wrap:wrap!important;justify-content:space-between!important;align-items:stretch!important;width:100%!important;margin-top:22px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-card{position:relative;width:31.4%!important;max-width:31.4%!important;flex:0 0 31.4%!important;min-height:710px;background:#fff!important;border:2px solid #D4A017!important;border-radius:20px!important;box-shadow:0 12px 22px rgba(7,20,82,.12)!important;overflow:hidden!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-card:before{content:"";position:absolute;left:-4%;right:-4%;top:0;height:154px;background:#071452;border-bottom:8px solid #D4A017;border-radius:18px 18px 50% 50% / 18px 18px 36% 36%;z-index:0}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-card:after{content:"✾";position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:-34px;transform:translateX(-50%);font-size:142px;line-height:1;color:rgba(212,160,23,.11);z-index:0}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-icon-wrap{position:absolute!important;top:-34px!important;left:50%!important;transform:translateX(-50%)!important;width:170px!important;height:170px!important;border-radius:50%!important;background:#fff!important;border:6px solid #D4A017!important;box-shadow:0 5px 14px rgba(7,20,82,.14)!important;z-index:3!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-icon-wrap .elementor-icon{color:#D4A017!important;font-size:76px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-content{position:relative!important;z-index:2!important;padding:188px 30px 34px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-heading .elementor-heading-title{font-size:24px!important;line-height:1.12!important;text-align:center!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;font-weight:900!important;color:#071452!important;letter-spacing:.3px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-mini-line{width:130px!important;height:18px!important;margin:8px auto 20px!important;position:relative!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-mini-line:before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;right:0;top:8px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#D4A017 18%,#D4A017 82%,transparent)}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-mini-line:after{content:"";position:absolute;left:50%;top:3px;transform:translateX(-50%);width:12px;height:12px;background:#D4A017;border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 0 7px #fff}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-text,.vmt-card-template .vmtc-text p{font-size:17px!important;line-height:1.58!important;color:#111!important;text-align:justify!important;letter-spacing:.2px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-text p{margin:0!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-mid .vmtc-heading .elementor-heading-title{font-size:22px!important}@media(max-width:1024px){.vmt-card-template .vmtc-title .elementor-heading-title{font-size:52px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-card{width:100%!important;max-width:100%!important;flex:0 0 100%!important;min-height:auto;margin-bottom:58px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-card:last-child{margin-bottom:0!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-content{padding:178px 34px 42px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-text,.vmt-card-template .vmtc-text p{font-size:17px!important}}@media(max-width:767px){.vmt-card-template .vmtc-title .elementor-heading-title{font-size:38px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor{width:280px}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor:before,.vmt-card-template .vmtc-decor:after{width:105px}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-card{border-radius:16px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-icon-wrap{width:132px!important;height:132px!important;top:-22px!important;border-width:5px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-icon-wrap .elementor-icon{font-size:58px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-card:before{height:125px}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-content{padding:146px 20px 32px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-heading .elementor-heading-title{font-size:19px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-mid .vmtc-heading .elementor-heading-title{font-size:18px!important}.vmt-card-template .vmtc-text,.vmt-card-template .vmtc-text p{font-size:15px!important;line-height:1.55!important}}

settings.editor: India has been a centre of learning since the dawn of civilization. The study of the Vedas in the education system of ancient India led to the emergence of Vedic Education. It was an extremely superior form of academic pursuit where the ultimate goal was self-realisation and character-building. It was believed that the training of the body, mind and the spirit was the way to holistic development of the pupil. Its curriculum was a rich amalgamation of the study of space, arithmetic, logic, metallurgy, the vast systems of education and architecture and much else. Vedic education instilled a sense of responsibility and values of humility, truthfulness, discipline and self-reliance in students thereby preparing them for a better society.

settings.title: DESTRUCTION OF VEDIC FORM OF LIFE AND ITS CONSEQUENCES

settings.editor: The invasions and conquests by foreign marauders led to a systematic destruction of the Vedic form of life and mainly the education. In the name of bringing civilization to the natives, our country was robbed of its riches, both the material and intellectual kind. Today, we blindly ape an alien culture and habits that is not much useful to our body and mind such as the useful to our body and mind such as the unlimited desires replaced the lust the economy of life, three principles, their profound ancient heritage and three philosophical concepts of the Vedas. Thus, our entire lives, including education, mental and physical health, economy and parenting are adversely impacted.

Robust learning of students can take place only if equal focus is given to both theoretical knowledge and practical wisdom, perhaps more of the latter, as was the case in Vedic times. The vast Vedic wisdom can be perfectly integrated with the CBSE Curriculum by creating a combination of academics and co-curricular activities, such as Vedic literature studies, music, art, yoga, community service, culinary art, etc. Vedic system of education lays emphasis on making students understand the concept of leading a balanced life. This very ideology of balance should be imparted to children from a very young age so that they are able to make the best choices in life and take informed decisions with respect to their studies, food, health, work and the way they want to live their life in best possible ways.
